questions.question: Write a simple program to calculate the sum of all elements in an array using both serial and parallel execution. Record the execution times for both serial and parallel execution. Compare the results and discuss the advantages of parallel execution.

An array of 1000 integers is to be summed using both serial and parallel execution. If it takes 10 seconds to perform the serial execution, calculate the expected execution time for parallel execution. Assume that the execution time for parallel execution is halved.

Compare the execution times for a matrix multiplication using both serial and parallel execution. Assume that the matrix is of size 100x100. Record the execution times and discuss the impact of the number of threads used in parallel execution.
